scripts.godot:test: bun run scripts/godot/import-project.ts && bun run scripts/godot/generate-core-fixtures.ts && bun run scripts/godot/run-core-parity.ts && bun run scripts/godot/run-save-manager.ts
scripts.godot:smoke: bun run scripts/godot/import-project.ts && bun run scripts/godot/run-screen-smoke.ts
scripts.godot:menu-flow: bun run scripts/godot/import-project.ts && bun run scripts/godot/run-menu-flow.ts
scripts.godot:auth-live: bun run scripts/godot/import-project.ts && bun run scripts/godot/run-supabase-auth-live.ts
scripts.backend:types: bunx supabase@2.109.1 gen types typescript --local > src/lib/database.types.ts
scripts.backend:types:remote: bunx supabase@2.109.1 gen types typescript --linked > src/lib/database.types.ts
